VERIFICATION_NOTE: GROK_OAUTH_DIRECTIVE names accounts.x.ai as auth server; accounts OIDC discovery returns 404. Hermes-agent uses auth.x.ai for authorize/token OIDC. Browser login UI is served at accounts.x.ai/oauth2/authorize; token exchange uses auth.x.ai/oauth2/token.
SCOPE: openid profile email offline_access grok-cli:access api:access
